mapper.sql: SELECT ca.id, ca.application_case_id, ca.job_posting_id, ca.job_posting_revision, latest_posting.latest_job_posting_revision AS latest_job_posting_revision, CASE WHEN latest_posting.latest_job_posting_revision IS NOT NULL AND ca.job_posting_revision IS NOT NULL AND ca.job_posting_revision < latest_posting.latest_job_posting_revision THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS stale_against_latest_posting, ac.user_id, u.email AS user_email, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, ca.company_summary, ca.recent_issues, ca.industry, ca.competitors, ca.interview_points, ca.sources, ca.verified_facts, ca.ai_inferences, ca.source_type, ca.checked_at, ca.refresh_recommended_at, ca.confirmed_at, ca.admin_memo, ca.created_at FROM company_analysis ca JOIN application_case ac ON ca.application_case_id = ac.id JOIN users u ON ac.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT application_case_id, MAX(revision) AS latest_job_posting_revision FROM job_posting GROUP BY application_case_id ) latest_posting ON latest_posting.application_case_id = ca.application_case_id

WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( ac.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{criteria.keyword}, '%') OR ac.job_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{criteria.keyword}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{criteria.keyword}, '%') OR ca.company_summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{criteria.keyword}, '%') OR ca.recent_issues LIKE CONCAT('%', #{criteria.keyword}, '%') OR ca.industry LIKE CONCAT('%', #{criteria.keyword}, '%') OR ca.interview_points LIKE CONCAT('%', #{criteria.keyword}, '%') OR CAST(ca.competitors AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{criteria.keyword}, '%') OR CAST(ca.sources AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{criteria.keyword}, '%') OR CAST(ca.verified_facts AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{criteria.keyword}, '%') OR CAST(ca.ai_inferences AS CHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{criteria.keyword}, '%') )
AND UPPER(ca.source_type) = #{criteria.sourceType}
AND ca.industry LIKE CONCAT('%', #{criteria.industry}, '%')
AND ca.confirmed_at IS NOT NULL
AND ca.confirmed_at IS NULL
AND ca.admin_memo IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ca.admin_memo) <> ''
AND (ca.admin_memo IS NULL OR TRIM(ca.admin_memo) = '')
AND ca.checked_at IS NOT NULL
AND ca.checked_at IS NULL
AND ca.refresh_recommended_at IS NOT NULL AND ca.refresh_recommended_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
AND (ca.refresh_recommended_at IS NULL OR ca.refresh_recommended_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
AND ca.application_case_id = #{criteria.applicationCaseId}
AND ac.user_id = #{criteria.userId}
AND ca.created_at >= #{criteria.createdFrom}
AND ca.created_at < DATE_ADD(#{criteria.createdTo}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)

choose.when: ORDER BY ca.created_at ASC, ca.id ASC
ORDER BY ca.checked_at DESC, ca.id DESC
ORDER BY ca.checked_at IS NULL, ca.checked_at ASC, ca.id ASC
ORDER BY ca.refresh_recommended_at DESC, ca.id DESC
ORDER BY ca.refresh_recommended_at IS NULL, ca.refresh_recommended_at ASC, ca.id ASC
ORDER BY ac.company_name DESC, ca.id DESC
ORDER BY ac.company_name ASC, ca.id ASC
ORDER BY ca.industry DESC, ca.id DESC
ORDER BY ca.industry IS NULL, ca.industry ASC, ca.id ASC
choose.otherwise: ORDER BY ca.created_at DESC, ca.id DESC

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ca.confirmed_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS confirmed_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ca.confirmed_at IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS unconfirmed_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ca.refresh_recommended_at IS NOT NULL AND ca.refresh_recommended_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS refresh_due_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ca.source_type IS NULL OR TRIM(ca.source_type) = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS missing_source_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ca.checked_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS checked_count, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ca.admin_memo IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ca.admin_memo) <> '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS memo_count FROM company_analysis ca JOIN application_case ac ON ca.application_case_id = ac.id JOIN users u ON ac.user_id = u.id
mapper.update: UPDATE company_analysis SET source_type = #{sourceType}, checked_at = CASE WHEN #{clearCheckedAt} THEN NULL WHEN #{checkedAt} IS NOT NULL THEN #{checkedAt} ELSE checked_at END, refresh_recommended_at = CASE WHEN #{clearRefreshRecommendedAt} THEN NULL WHEN #{refreshRecommendedAt} IS NOT NULL THEN #{refreshRecommendedAt} ELSE refresh_recommended_at END WHERE id = #{id}
